description: Major global OSAT company headquartered in Singapore. Services: wafer-level packaging, laminate packages, leadframe solutions, SiP integration, MEMS & sensors, power applications, wafer probing, and final testing. Serves automotive, computing, and communications markets. Production bases in Singapore, Thailand, Indonesia, and China. Owned by Wise Road Capital (Beijing). Estimated valuation ~$3B USD.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - wafer probing and dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Private (owned by Wise Road Capital, Beijing). Founded 1997 in Singapore. Foxconn reportedly bid to acquire UTAC for up to $3B in 2025. Major OSAT with wafer probing and dicing operations requiring Accretech equipment.

_metadata.dataSource: UTAC corporate site, SEMI, industry research
